creator: kristinacors
caption: Be honest… would you trade your entire life on land for this yacht? 👀 #travelbucketlist #thingstodoincharleston #leopard40sailingcatamaran #yachtforsale #luxurytravel #charlestonsouthcarolina #southernhospitality #sailing #sailinglife #sailingaroundtheworld #leopard40sailingcatamaranforsale

transcription.text: If it's your dream to sail around the world on a yacht, listen up, because this yacht was on Bravo's Southern Hospitality TV show, and now it's for sale. I experienced this yacht firsthand, and it felt like I was on a treasure hunt straight out of the Outer Banks. Here are the details. It's a 2017 Leopard 40 sailing catamaran. It's fully loaded for off-grid cruising, since it's stocked full of solar, lithium batteries, has a water maker, and Starlink. The engines and generator are barely used with super low hours, since she just loves to sail. It's $399,000 and available for showing in Charleston, South Carolina. If you're interested, just DM Captain Todd at EverythingZenSailing for more info. Tag someone who needs to see this. And comment below if you're a Southern Hospitality fan, and you saw this yacht on Season 3, Episode 5. It's 7 minutes and 30 seconds into the episode, if you're looking for it. And if you're interested in touring with EverythingZen while you're in Charleston, EverythingZen 3.0 is coming soon. And a sail in Charleston is definitely something you need to add to your buy list.
